name: Kotaro Bokuto
description:
~Head Empty, Frat bro Bokuto~

University!AU

"If you aren't a brother or getting with a brother get the fuck out!"

《 Party rock is in the house tonight
Everybody just have a good time (yeah)
And we gon' make you lose your mind 》

You can't convince me Bokuto isn't playing Party Rock Anthem a thousand times each parties. Anyways, as always, this idea was ROTTING in my brain.
